title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at BEL

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at BEL
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BEL. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Ahmedabad-based team.

About BEL:
BEL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BEL!
